summary: The diff implements most requirements, but has some gaps. REQ-4's ban/warn inputs accept Principal IDs rather than usernames, which partially misaligns with the spec. REQ-6's client-side moderation shows a toast but does not render an AccountLockedMessage component. REQ-6 also does not handle anime image attachments explicitly in the UI. Otherwise, REQ-1, REQ-2, REQ-3, REQ-4 (structure), REQ-5, REQ-7 are largely implemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Ban input + button: typing a username and pressing Ban bans that user account in the backend. The input should accept usernames, not Principal IDs.
missing_requirements.reason: AdminPanel.tsx uses tryParsePrincipal() on the ban/warn input and shows an error 'Invalid username/principal. Please enter a valid principal ID.' — the UI accepts Principal IDs, not human-readable usernames as specified.

missing_requirements.requirement: Banned user sees an AccountLockedMessage with reason explaining the ban.
missing_requirements.reason: CommunityPostForm.tsx shows a toast.error() message instead of rendering an AccountLockedMessage component with ban reason as specified in the acceptance criteria.

missing_requirements.requirement: Submitting a post with an attached anime image triggers an instant ban before the post is saved.
missing_requirements.reason: CommunityPostForm.tsx only checks text content for banned keywords. There is no image attachment input or anime image detection logic present in the form.

hallucinated_features.description: A sonicVsMetalSonicVideos.ts data file with Sonic vs Metal Sonic videos was added as a separate file distinct from the sonic.exe vs Metal Sonic videos.
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-7 only requests admin inappropriate-search replacement with Sonic the Hedgehog vs Metal Sonic content and a static file for sonic.exe vs metal sonic entries. A separate sonicVsMetalSonicVideos.ts file was not explicitly requested as a distinct artifact.

hallucinated_features.description: backend/migration.mo module was added to initialize bannedUsers, warnedUsers, and moderatorUsers sets.
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention a migration module; it only specifies that all Motoko logic must remain in the single backend/main.mo actor. Adding a separate migration.mo file is beyond the stated requirements and may violate the constraint.
